title: Attribute Skills
description: Add skills that can enhance the player's attributes.
body:
Add skills that can enhance the player's attributes. In total, 13 attribute-enhancing skills have been added, which can be enhanced by experience. To enhance a skill, open the GUI (change from the key settings, default is unassigned) and use the experience to press a button to enhance it. The required experience level is also displayed. By default it is (each skill level * 5) (can be set in config). Maximum levels are 10000 each (but almost impossible in survival).
Initial levels are not very strong, so there is not much chance of breaking the game balance in vanilla.
## Below is a description of the buttons.
- ![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f57c659f71891ade552784c8f4a73055989f7602.png)
Strengthens the player's armor.
- ![Armor Toughness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ef2714959ef53cd9ddaf0920651749db2cf33f.png)
Strengthens the player's armor toughness.
- ![Attack Damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d5087c98732f901fd8456851af5905f22ac4f0.png)
Strengthens the player's attack damage.
- ![Attack Knockback](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7a53391e08a8e14e5b0b93c6212c9b90b35a88e.png)
Strengthens the player's attack knockback.
- ![Attack Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f507db23aa2b789c8fda3b080a73df9dcd9f095d.png)
Strengthens the player's attack speed.
- ![Block Reach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b6c2904f1c120d451fa55de5fcc2d0063444bd9.png)
Strengthens the player's block reach.
- ![Entity Reach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e387c2722e40c00441c4f7728e26707ee2ac60.png)
Strengthens the player's entity reach.
- ![Knockback Resistance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39a8087d2ec29a113ae54b32c30c45cd1c21cd38.png)
Strengthens the player's knockback resistance.
- ![Luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56467f14447e82e949377b24b69a8aefac2a99db.png)
Strengthens the player's luck.
- ![Max Health](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87123cec53e755f992be2f3c87ef82dfdde6f9fa.png)
Strengthens the player's max health.
- ![Movement Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a0d644ec7876d301ffd61be52c71dc237f26860.png)
Strengthens the player's movement speed.
- ![Step Height Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5316f2c8c6bc1e7652ea87bc9f01f3b6b403f34a.png)
Strengthens the player's step height additions(Auto Jumping).
- ![Swim Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6894484906fbdd5a3434406cb5886b7845e3e903.png)
Strengthens the player's swim speed(movement speed in water).
